title: Mini Project: Student Grade Book
description: Combine everything you've learned into a complete program.
objectives: Combine functions, lists, dictionaries, loops, and conditionals
Parse structured input and produce formatted output
recap: You combined variables, input, conditionals, loops, lists, dictionaries, and functions into a complete program. This is real programming!
practicePrompts: Add a feature to find the student with the highest average grade.
Can you save the grade book to a file and load it back?
